flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Rochester rose 16% between 2006 and 2009 ($33.4k → $38.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Rochester rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($59.4k → $67.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Rochester fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.4% → 0.0%).
